title: Add deep bass cyberpunk Psy chill background music

requirements.summary: Replace the existing forge ambient sound system with deep bass cyberpunk Psy chill background music that plays continuously when the user enables audio via the music toggle button in the header
acceptanceCriteria: The music has a deep bass character with cyberpunk and Psy chill aesthetic
Music plays continuously on loop when enabled
The existing header audio toggle button (XPath: /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[1]/div[1]/header[1]/div[1]/div[1]/div[1]/button[1]) controls the music playback
Music volume is appropriately balanced for background listening
Audio stops cleanly when toggled off or component unmounts

file_operations.description: Replace the current forge ambient sound generation (metal clinks, heat hum, noise) with synthesized deep bass cyberpunk Psy chill music using Web Audio API. Generate deep bass tones (40-80Hz range), atmospheric pads with cyberpunk characteristics, and rhythmic elements with Psy chill vibe. Maintain the existing volume toggle functionality and audio context initialization/cleanup logic. Ensure music loops continuously when enabled and stops cleanly on toggle off or component unmount.

requirements.summary: Update the AmbientSound component to generate or play deep bass cyberpunk Psy chill music instead of the current forge ambient sounds (metal clinks, heat hum, noise)
acceptanceCriteria: The component generates synthesized deep bass tones with cyberpunk characteristics
The music has a Psy chill vibe with atmospheric pads and rhythmic elements
The existing volume toggle functionality remains intact
Audio context initialization and cleanup logic is preserved

file_operations.description: Implement synthesized music generation using Web Audio API oscillators, filters, and gain nodes. Create deep bass layer using sine/sawtooth oscillators in 40-80Hz range. Add atmospheric pad layer with detuned oscillators and low-pass filters for cyberpunk ambience. Implement rhythmic pulse elements with envelope automation for Psy chill character. Use OscillatorNode, BiquadFilterNode, and GainNode to craft the soundscape. Preserve the existing volume control mechanism and ensure proper audio context cleanup on unmount.
